title: The Buddy's Project: Management Wanted Edition
description: Ever wondered what Fazbear Entertainment would have been like had it been founded in Canada? No? Well now you can find out anyways!
body:
THIS IS A VERYYYYY ROUGH BETA, AND IS SUBJECT TO CHANGE DRASTICALLY.
Requires Geckolib and FNAF: Management Wanted by OVDR Studios

![A plushie of Buddy the Bunny](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f049cb6761d604410da82f486012f3f4dac539fb.png)

Ever wondered what Fazbear Entertainment would have been like had it been founded in Canada? No? Well now you can find out anyways!

This mod adds animatronics and decor from my own FNaF AU, including:

- A brand-new look for Freddy and the band!

![Withered Freddy Fazbear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33c599e23a25abdbbbe9260af6d3aae0057edd9e.png)

- Space-themed Fredbear's Decor!

![Lunar Lander Cutout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30101223b3799963ea77b6e7e92b4806860f2337.png)

- Buddy the Bunny and Her Friends!

![Buddy The Bunny says hello!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2a2b74bac156579dc3f475f3c9e7669935a206f.png)

- And Relics from the 70's...

![Goldie The Bear Animatronic!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/340ccfff8c15f9ea00c631d671c4c3f4c830ef0c.png)



_Check out other Homemade Studios Projects:_
[Chuck E. Cheese: Back To The Bots](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chuck-e-cheese-back-to-the-bots)
